Rice Blast: Apply Tricyclazole (250-300 ml/acre) or Isoprothiolane (1-1.5 L/acre). Maintain proper water management and avoid excess nitrogen.
Brown Spot: Apply Carbendazim (500 gm/acre) or Propiconazole (250-300 ml/acre). Ensure proper field drainage and balanced fertilization.
Bacterial Blight: Use Streptocycline (17 mg/L) spray or Copper Oxychloride (2.5 gm/L). Avoid excessive nitrogen and maintain proper water levels.
Tungro Virus: Control leafhoppers with Imidacloprid (1 ml/L) or Thiamethoxam (0.5 gm/L). Use resistant varieties like IR 36, IR 64.
Sheath Blight: Apply Validamycin (100 ml/acre) or Hexaconazole (250 ml/acre). Maintain proper plant spacing and avoid dense planting.
False Smut: Apply Propiconazole (250 ml/acre) or Tebuconazole (200 ml/acre) at booting stage. Use disease-free seeds.
Healthy: No treatment needed. Maintain regular crop care with proper irrigation and balanced fertilization.
Leaf Scald: Apply Copper Oxychloride (2.5 gm/L) or Streptocycline (17 mg/L). Ensure proper drainage and avoid water stagnation.
